headline: BNP Paribas Wealth Management launches AI Centre of Excellence in Singapore to build generative and predictive AI across $447 billion Asia business
the_so_what: Anchoring an AI Centre of Excellence in Singapore — Asia's wealth management hub — signals that BNP Paribas is building AI capabilities closest to where the growth is, not retrofitting from Paris.
summary: BNP Paribas Wealth Management Asia launched an AI Centre of Excellence in Singapore in November 2025, focused on co-developing generative and predictive AI solutions for its $447 billion Asia business. The centre is structured around four pillars — Innovate, Deploy, Accelerate, and Upskill — and targets portfolio analytics, client onboarding automation, and advisory workflow improvements. It collaborates with BNP Paribas headquarters in Paris and aligns with Singapore's national AI strategy. A dedicated learning and development curriculum equips relationship managers, technology specialists, and designated AI ambassadors with hands-on AI expertise.

key_stat.label: BNP Paribas Wealth Management Asia AUM — AI Centre of Excellence launched Singapore, November 2025

Four pillars: Innovate, Deploy, Accelerate, Upskill (article)
Focuses on portfolio analytics, client onboarding, and advisory automation (article)

Dedicated L&D curriculum for relationship managers, technology specialists, and AI ambassadors (article)
CEO Asia: Arnaud Tellier; Asia Chief Digital & AI Officer: Vivien Jong (article)
_governance.notes: All claims sourced from Asian Investor Wealth article dated November 12, 2025. Caproasia published corroborating coverage November 13, 2025. human_approved: Track 2 entry written directly from verified source.
